What We Offer

Our Core Services

From supply and installation to annual maintenance — complete HVAC and industrial cooling solutions for factories, process plants and commercial buildings.

❄️
Spares Available
Air-Cooled Condensing Units
Industrial and commercial air-cooled condensers in multiple capacities. Suitable for refrigeration, process cooling and HVAC applications in harsh Indian climates.
Enquire Now →
💨
OEM Parts
Air Dryers & Spares
Refrigerated and desiccant compressed air dryers with full spare parts support — filters, separators, heat exchanger cores, valves and control cards.
Enquire Now →
🔧
AMC Available
HVAC Systems & Maintenance
End-to-end HVAC solutions — design, supply, installation and Annual Maintenance Contracts for factories, warehouses, hospitals and commercial spaces.
Enquire Now →
⚡
ATEX Certified
Flameproof Compressors
Zone 1 & Zone 2 certified flameproof compressors for hazardous areas — chemical plants, refineries, paint shops and pharmaceutical manufacturing.
Enquire Now →
Product Range

Heat Exchangers & Components

We stock and supply a wide range of heat transfer equipment and critical HVAC components — with fast delivery across India.

🔄
Shell & Tube Heat Exchangers
High-pressure units for process cooling, condensing and heating duties in industrial plants.
🧊
Plate Heat Exchangers
Compact, high-efficiency plates for HVAC chillers, food processing and pharmaceutical applications.
🌡️
Evaporators & Condensers
Custom refrigeration system components — bare-tube, finned-coil and microchannel types available.
🏭
Industrial Chillers
Water and glycol chillers for process cooling, injection moulding and data centre applications.
⚙️
Compressor Spares
Scroll, reciprocating and screw compressor parts — valves, gaskets, oil separators, crankshafts.
🔩
Spares & Consumables
Filters, expansion valves, solenoids, pressure controls and OEM consumable kits.

Why Enviro India

A Partner You Can Rely On

🏆
OEM-Authorized Supply
Genuine parts from leading brands — Daikin, Danfoss, Emerson, Bitzer and more — at competitive prices with full warranty.

Fast Spares Delivery
Stocked warehouse with critical spares ready for same-day or next-day dispatch to minimize your plant downtime.
